raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "response": "Compliance checklist: (1) GDPR Article 22 — automated decision consent flow exists and is legally sufficient: OK, (2) AZ Personal Data Protection Act — compliance for Baku launch: WARN, (3) Platform liability — if AURA score is used for hiring decisions, legal exposure exists: BLOCK, (4) Data processor agreements — Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway as processors, DPAs are partially in place: WARN, (5) Terms of Service — current ToS covers AI-generated assessments: OK", "whistleblower_flag": null}
response: Compliance checklist: (1) GDPR Article 22 — automated decision consent flow exists and is legally sufficient: OK, (2) AZ Personal Data Protection Act — compliance for Baku launch: WARN, (3) Platform liability — if AURA score is used for hiring decisions, legal exposure exists: BLOCK, (4) Data processor agreements — Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway as processors, DPAs are partially in place: WARN, (5) Terms of Service — current ToS covers AI-generated assessments: OK
